title: Route control and security are supply gameplay
discovery: Road control, checkpoints, prisoner movement, and convoy security are core logistics problems, not background patrol tasks.
evidence: source_library/54_military_police_corps_united_states.md:15-17 - military police handle traffic control, POWs, route security, and rear-area order.
source_library/61_feldgendarmerie.md:15-17 - Feldgendarmerie handles road traffic control and checkpoint security.
source_library/59_prisoner_of_war_camp.md:15-17 - detention and guard duty consume resources.
why: If the road is blocked, the tank unit is not just late; it is starved, stalled, or forced to reroute.

variable.name: route_control
variable.definition: How effectively roads, convoys, and checkpoints are managed.

pressure: Security friction directly slows supply, evacuation, and tempo.
